data.body: PLAN RE-VERIFICATION vs shipped 1fa8 (main @ 49ad69bcd, 2026-07-02). Plan remains ACCURATE — every S1-S6 work item still needed; zero scope collisions with what 1fa8 shipped. Confirmations: LLM-Review copyCondition still NO_CODE_CHANGE-only (S1 amendment needed as planned); NO [submit] section exists (S1 pin needed); setup-project.sh want-dict unchanged at line 57 (S1 reference exact); Verified label shipped with copyCondition=NO_CODE_CHANGE — IDENTICAL to our re-run posture decision, so S1 only records rationale; gerrit-verify.yaml exists with GERRIT_REFSPEC input + checkout-gerrit-change-action + concurrency keyed on CHANGE_ID cancel-in-progress (S3 verification targets all real now). NEW FACTS folded in: (1) Verified submit-requirement is authored INACTIVE (applicableIf=is:false) — flip is 1fa8's remaining step; S5 scenario 6 (CI blocks submit) REQUIRES the flip, correctly modeled by our epic-level depends_on 1fa8 (still in_progress). (2) S3 file-impact paths corrected: the g2p artifact is gerrit_to_platform.ini.template + materialize-g2p-config.sh (SSM-rendered at boot), not a plain ini; the template carries NO branch-filter key (only comment-added recheck mapping + token) — supports the branch-agnostic no-op hypothesis, g2p-source verification still required. (3) 1fa8 shipped runbooks two-vote-gate-rollback.md + g2p-ci-credentials.md and monitoring_1fa8.tf — S6 back-out should EXTEND two-vote-gate-rollback.md (not duplicate), S2's alarm should model on monitoring_1fa8.tf (fresher analog than monitoring_s4b.tf). (4) ATTESTATION DRIFT (expected + correct): 1fa8's change rewrote 3 of this epic's dep-pinned files (project.config, CONTRIBUTING.md, gerrit-aws-setup.md — hashes verified changed); the plan-review attestation is HMAC-certified but will read not-valid at claim → re-run review-plan at claim time.
